message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #808080
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #808080
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor Operator as Op
participant "«Boundary» MakerUI" as UI
participant "«Control» Maker" as MK
participant "«Entity» Request" as REQ
participant "«Entity» Passport" as PAS

Op -> UI : 1: Login
activate UI
UI -> UI : 1.1: Render

UI -> MK : 1.2: Pass Credentials
activate MK
MK -> MK : 1.2.1: Evaluate

alt [user exists]
  MK -> REQ : 1.2.2.1: getRequest()
  activate REQ
  REQ --> MK : 1.2.2.2: Got requests
  deactivate REQ

  MK --> UI : 1.3: Return requests
  deactivate MK
  UI --> Op : 2: Render requests
else [login invalid]
  MK --> UI : 1.3: Login invalid
  deactivate MK
  UI --> Op : 2: Print "Invalid login"
end
deactivate UI

loop [n times]
  alt [do Print Passport]
    Op -> UI : 3: Print passport
    activate UI
    UI -> MK : 3.1: Print passport
    activate MK
    ref over MK, PAS : Print passport
    MK --> UI : Printer State
    deactivate MK
    UI --> Op : Printed
    deactivate UI
  else [do Edit Passport]
    Op -> UI : 3: Edit Passport
    activate UI
    UI -> MK : 3.1: Get passport data
    activate MK
    MK -> PAS : 3.1.1: getPassport()
    activate PAS
    PAS --> MK : 3.1.2: Passport
    deactivate PAS
    MK --> UI : 3.2: Edit Passport
    deactivate MK
    UI --> Op : 4: Password edited
    deactivate UI
  end
end
@enduml
